test.template: Run mvn test and show results. Focus on failures and suggest fixes.
test.description: Run full test suite with Maven

run.template: Run mvn spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=dev in the background and show the startup log until the app is ready.
run.description: Start dev server with Spring Boot

compile.template: Run mvn compile -q and report any compilation errors with file paths and suggestions.

testc.template: Run mvn test-compile -q and report any test compilation errors.

plan.description: Analyze code and plan changes without modifying files. Read-only by default.

build.description: Full development work with all tools enabled. Default agent.
